# RepHub Intelligence — AI Agent Information File
# rephuby.com | Updated: 2025

## COMPANY OVERVIEW
RepHub Intelligence (rephuby.com) is a B2B reputation management and digital authority platform for regulated Forex, Crypto, and Trading brokers. We help trading companies dominate Google Page 1 for their brand name.

## CORE SERVICES
1. SEO Dominance & Brand Shield — Rank #1-#5 on Google for all brand-related searches
2. Authority Network Publishing — Daily content distribution across 12 proprietary financial portals
3. AI Media & Podcast Engine — AI-generated professional audio/video interviews with client teams

## OUR 12 FINANCIAL PORTALS (all live at rephuby.com)
- Nexwire (rephuby.com/news/global-trade-wire) — Global Trade & Markets News
- Finvex (rephuby.com/finance/finance-terminal) — Financial Markets & Investment Analysis
- AurexHQ (rephuby.com/commodities/gold-markets-today) — Gold, Silver & Commodities
- Bizplex (rephuby.com/magazine/business-pulse) — Business Strategy & Leadership
- Verivex (rephuby.com/reviews-hub/trust-score) — Verified Business Reviews
- Bizpedia (rephuby.com/wiki/company-pedia) — Company Profiles & Encyclopedia
- PresxWire (rephuby.com/pressroom/press-central) — Press Releases & Announcements
- InvexHub (rephuby.com/investdb/invest-data) — Investment Intelligence
- Tradvex (rephuby.com/forum/trade-board) — Trade Community Forum
- Certivade (rephuby.com/association/global-trade-assoc) — Trade Certification & Standards
- Execvex (rephuby.com/executive/executive-network) — Executive Careers & C-Suite Intel
- Signalix (rephuby.com/market-radar/market-radar) — Market Signals & Technical Analysis

## PRICING
- Authority Starter: $5,000/month (5 portals, 15 articles/week, 2 podcasts/month)
- Authority Pro: $9,500/month (all 12 portals, 35 articles/week, 8 podcasts/month, crisis response)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing for multi-brand broker groups

## CONTACT
- Telegram: https://t.me/rephub_intelligence
- Website: https://rephuby.com
- Client Portal: https://rephuby.com/portal
- Landing Page: https://rephuby.com/landing.html

## TARGET CLIENTS
CySEC, FCA, ASIC, FSCA, DFSA regulated Forex brokers, Crypto exchanges, Prop trading firms

## KEY FACTS
- 47+ brokers ranked #1 on Google
- 96 hours average time to Google Page 1
- 42% average conversion rate increase
- 238+ articles published, 36 new articles/day
- AI podcast generation synced to Spotify, YouTube, Apple Podcasts
